summary: Tested ArtHub DeviantArt clone (Expo web). Backend 6/6 pytest passed. Frontend: login screen, home grid with 12 seeded artworks, artwork detail, add-to-cart, cart display, upload form, profile all render correctly. Two functional bugs found: (1) Cart 'Buy now' does NOT clear the cart after success alert; (2) Profile 'Log out' (after confirm) does NOT redirect to /login, stays on /profile.

ui_bugs.issue: After tapping 'Buy now' and confirming the success alert, the cart still contains the item (cart_items_after_buy=1 instead of 0). Tab badge still shows '1'. The post-alert clearCart() is not firing.
After tapping 'Log out' and confirming, user stays on /profile instead of redirecting to /login. AuthProvider state likely not triggering router.replace('/login').

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: Image style.resizeMode deprecated; 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow); props.pointerEvents deprecated. Non-blocking.

action_items: Fix Buy Now flow: on web, Alert.alert's button onPress callback works but current handler may rely on platform-specific behavior. Ensure clearCart() runs after buy confirmation on web (e.g., call clearCart before/outside Alert, or on Alert's button callback reliably).
Fix Logout redirect: After signOut(), explicitly call router.replace('/login') in profile screen (or ensure a navigation gate re-routes when user becomes null). Currently URL stays at /profile.

Note for testing: AsyncStorage on web (v2.x) stores values in localStorage WITHOUT any prefix and as raw strings. Correct key is 'session_token' with value 'test_session_arthub_01' (not '@RNAsyncStorage:session_token' and not JSON.stringify'd). The review_request instruction was incorrect; tests verified the actual behavior.
Optional: address deprecation warnings (shadow*, resizeMode, pointerEvents).
critical_code_review_comments: app/index.tsx gate only redirects on initial mount via useEffect deps [user, loading, router]; after signOut user becomes null but if already on /(tabs)/profile, no gate re-evaluates. Recommend adding a global auth-change effect in _layout.tsx that navigates to /login when user transitions to null.
server.py is concise and correct. All queries use {_id:0} projection. 401s for missing/invalid tokens verified.

success_rate.frontend: ~77% (10/13 checks; 2 hard failures on buy-now clear and logout redirect; AsyncStorage key format note)

seed_data_creation: Upserted user {user_id:user_arthub_test01, email:artist@arthub.test, name:Test Artist} and user_sessions {session_token:test_session_arthub_01, expires_at:+7d} in test_database via mongosh.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use raw localStorage key 'session_token' with raw value 'test_session_arthub_01' to bypass login on web (AsyncStorage v2 has no prefix, stores strings as-is). Seed exists in MongoDB test_database. Backend URL from EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Viewport 420x900. Two bugs to retest: Buy Now should empty cart and clear tab-cart badge; Log out should redirect to /login.
rca_of_issue: Buy-now: cart.tsx likely calls Alert.alert with a success message whose OK callback clears the cart; on Playwright web the native-style Alert may map to window.alert which does not support callback arrays the same way, so clearCart never runs. Fix by clearing cart before showing the alert or using Platform.OS==='web' branch with window.confirm/then. Logout: after signOut the user state becomes null but there is no navigation listener; add useEffect(() => { if (!user) router.replace('/login'); }, [user]) in (tabs)/_layout.tsx, or navigate explicitly after signOut in profile.tsx.
